faqs.q: Are there extra charges if traffic suddenly increases?
faqs.a: There's no need to worry. AWS-based hosting uses Auto Scaling to automatically expand server capacity during traffic spikes, so your service will never go down. Excess transfer is billed transparently at per-plan rates (e.g., 400 KRW/GB on the Plus plan), and we have a pre-alert system to prevent unexpected high charges. If you let us know about peak periods like semester starts or exam seasons in advance, our dedicated engineers will recommend the optimal plan and cost-saving strategies.

faqs.q: Can I migrate from my current hosting?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. WEBHEADS specializes in zero-downtime migration from other hosting providers. The process follows a systematic approach: ① Analysis of existing server environment and migration planning → ② Replication of data, content, and databases → ③ New server testing and verification → ④ DNS switchover and stabilization monitoring. Since we conduct thorough testing before the DNS switchover, learners experience zero service interruption. Our dedicated engineers also provide 72-hour intensive monitoring after migration is complete.

faqs.q: How is the SSL certificate provided?
faqs.a: All hosting plans include a free Let's Encrypt SSL certificate that auto-renews before expiration, so you don't need to manage it manually. HTTPS ensures that learner personal data and payment information are securely encrypted during transmission. If your organization requires enterprise-grade paid certificates (EV SSL, OV SSL, etc.) — common for financial institutions or government agencies — WEBHEADS handles the entire process from purchase to installation and renewal.

faqs.q: What's the incident response process?
faqs.a: WEBHEADS operates a 24/7/365 NOC (Network Operations Center) team that monitors server, network, and application status in real-time. When an incident is detected, the assigned engineer is immediately notified, and initial response begins within 10 minutes on average. After recovery, we prepare and share a Root Cause Analysis (RCA) report, and implement follow-up measures to prevent the same incident from recurring. Throughout the process, we keep you updated in real-time via KakaoTalk, email, and phone.

faqs.q: What if I run out of video storage?
faqs.a: Running out of your plan's base storage does not cause any service interruption. You can expand storage unlimitedly at per-GB rates (e.g., 800 KRW/GB on the Plus plan). We send pre-alerts when your storage usage reaches 80%, and for organizations with large volumes of content, we also offer cost-effective alternatives such as dedicated S3 storage plans or NAS integration. Feel free to reach out anytime and we'll recommend the optimal solution for your needs.

faqs.q: Can I request additional development during a maintenance contract?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. Standard plans include up to 6 minor feature improvements per month, while Premium plans offer unlimited requests. Examples include adding bulletin board fields, design modifications, or new popup banners. For larger-scope work like new feature development or major redesigns, we provide a separate quote with priority scheduling and discounts for maintenance clients.

faqs.q: What's the incident response process?
faqs.a: WEBHEADS' dedicated NOC team monitors servers and networks 24/7/365. When an incident is detected, the process follows: ① Automatic alert to the assigned engineer → ② Initial response within 5 minutes on average → ③ Real-time progress updates shared with the client (via KakaoTalk/email) → ④ Incident recovery → ⑤ Root Cause Analysis (RCA) report preparation and sharing. We take full responsibility for follow-up measures to eliminate the root cause and prevent recurrence.

faqs.q: Can I switch from another provider?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. We start by thoroughly analyzing your existing server environment, source code, and database structure, then develop a zero-downtime transition plan. After migration, we conduct 72-hour intensive monitoring to confirm stabilization, and we also assist with the handover process from your previous provider. We've successfully completed dozens of hosting transitions, so you can trust us with the process.

faqs.q: What's included in the monthly report?
faqs.a: Monthly reports include detailed information on server uptime, daily/hourly traffic analysis, incident occurrence and resolution history, security vulnerability scan results, performance metrics (CPU, memory, disk), and a summary of all patches, updates, and feature improvements performed during the month. Reports are delivered in PDF format via email at the beginning of each month, and we can also schedule video meetings to discuss the report contents if needed.

faqs.q: What are the contract terms and cancellation conditions?
faqs.a: The minimum contract period is 3 months, after which it automatically extends on a month-to-month basis. To cancel, simply provide written notice (including email) at least 1 month in advance. Upon cancellation, we safely hand over all server data and source code. Plan changes (upgrades or downgrades) are also freely available during the contract period, so you can flexibly adjust based on your operational needs.

faqs.q: How often are security patches applied?
faqs.a: Security patches are applied on a priority basis depending on severity. Critical/High CVE-rated security patches are applied within 24 hours of release. Regular patches are tested and batch-applied during monthly checkups (1-2 times per month). All patch history is recorded in change management documentation and shared transparently. We conduct thorough testing before and after each patch to ensure zero service impact.

faqs.q: Can I use existing FAQs right after chatbot deployment?
faqs.a: Yes, you can use them immediately. Simply upload your existing FAQ documents (Excel, Word, PDF, etc.) through the admin page, and the AI will automatically analyze the content and index it using vector embeddings. Within about 30 minutes of upload, the chatbot will begin providing natural conversational answers based on that content. When new FAQs are added, they're reflected in real-time without any retraining process, so your chatbot always has the latest information.

faqs.q: How are unanswered questions handled?
faqs.a: When the chatbot detects a low-confidence answer, the fallback scenario automatically activates. It politely suggests 'Connect to Agent' or 'Submit Inquiry' options to the learner, ensuring no question goes unanswered. Additionally, unanswered questions are automatically collected in the admin dashboard, which allows for periodic supplementation of chatbot training data to continuously expand the range of answerable questions.

faqs.q: Can it be applied to both KakaoTalk and website?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. The WEBHEADS AI chatbot is designed to deploy from a single engine to multiple channels simultaneously — KakaoTalk, website, and mobile app. When you update FAQs in one place, changes are instantly reflected across all channels, reducing management burden. You can even customize the response tone and greetings differently for each channel. Adding new channels requires no additional development — just a simple admin setting.

faqs.q: Is learner personal information protected?
faqs.a: Learner privacy protection is our top priority. All conversation data is encrypted using TLS 1.3 protocol, and sensitive information such as social security numbers and phone numbers is automatically masked. We comply with privacy laws and GDPR guidelines by collecting conversation logs only on a consent basis, and data past its retention period is automatically deleted. We also conduct regular security audits to verify the appropriateness of personal data handling procedures.

faqs.q: How is chatbot response accuracy managed?
faqs.a: Chatbot response accuracy is continuously improved through a multi-layered quality management system. Monthly fine-tuning sessions incorporate the latest educational information and policy changes, while a feedback loop analyzes learner reactions (like/dislike). The admin dashboard provides real-time monitoring of key metrics including response accuracy, satisfaction scores, and unanswered question rates. When inaccurate responses are identified, they are immediately corrected and reflected in retraining.

faqs.q: Can an existing web LMS be converted to an app?

faqs.q: Is post-launch maintenance available?

faqs.q: Does offline learning work for all content?

Learners can pre-download content over Wi-Fi and continue learning without an internet connection for items that the administrator has allowed for offline download. Downloaded content remains DRM-protected, making unauthorized copying or redistribution impossible. Content is automatically deleted when the enrollment period expires, ensuring thorough copyright protection.

faqs.q: Do learners need to install any software for DRM?
faqs.a: No, they don't. WEBHEADS DRM solutions are based on the EME (Encrypted Media Extensions) web standard, so learners don't need to install any plugins or programs. Content plays directly in major browsers including Chrome, Safari, Edge, and Firefox, and works the same on mobile browsers. Unlike legacy ActiveX-based DRM, there's virtually no learner inconvenience, which dramatically reduces support complaints — the biggest advantage.

faqs.q: Which is better, Catenoid or ZonePlayer?
faqs.a: Both are proven DRM solutions, but with different strengths. Catenoid (Kollus) excels at large-scale traffic handling and global content distribution through tight CDN integration, making it ideal for organizations with high concurrent users or international learners. ZonePlayer (ZONE) specializes in content protection features like screen capture prevention, forensic watermarking, and screen recording detection, making it recommended for organizations with high-value premium content. If you're unsure which solution fits best, schedule a free consultation for a personalized recommendation.

faqs.q: Can DRM be added to an existing LMS?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. WEBHEADS DRM solutions are designed with REST APIs, allowing flexible integration with not only WEBHEADS LMS but also third-party LMS platforms. It's also possible to batch-apply DRM to previously uploaded video content. The integration is carried out in phases to ensure no disruption to your existing service. Typically, integration takes about 1-2 weeks to complete, with a dedicated engineer supporting you throughout the entire process.

faqs.q: Does DRM work on mobile apps?
faqs.a: Yes, it works perfectly in mobile environments. We apply Apple FairPlay Streaming for iOS and Google Widevine DRM for Android, providing platform-optimized content protection. Through dedicated SDKs, content can be securely played within the app, and screen recording prevention and screenshot blocking features work identically in mobile environments. Learners simply launch the app and DRM-protected content plays automatically without any additional setup.

faqs.q: Does DRM affect video playback speed?
faqs.a: There is virtually no perceivable speed degradation. WEBHEADS DRM solutions use Hardware-Accelerated Decryption to decrypt video in real-time, maintaining the same quality and playback speed as non-DRM content. There is a license authentication process of a few hundred milliseconds during initial loading, but this is imperceptible to users. Even 4K high-definition content plays smoothly without any buffering.

faqs.q: What conditions trigger automated learning reminders?

faqs.q: How is opt-out processed?

faqs.q: How long does PG integration take?
faqs.a: On average, integration is completed within 1-2 weeks per PG provider. The process follows: ① PG merchant agreement signing → ② Test environment integration and payment testing → ③ Production environment switchover. While the merchant agreement must be completed by your organization, WEBHEADS provides document guidance and contract process consulting. For multiple simultaneous PG integrations, we work in parallel to minimize total timeline.

faqs.q: Can multiple PGs be used simultaneously?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. You can integrate domestic PGs (KG Inicis, Toss Payments, NHN KCP, etc.) and global PGs (Stripe, PayPal, etc.) simultaneously, with automatic routing to the optimal PG per payment method. For example, domestic credit card payments route to the lowest-fee PG, while international payments automatically connect to Stripe. If one PG experiences an outage, automatic failover to another PG maximizes payment success rates.

faqs.q: How are subscriptions configured?
faqs.a: You can easily set up subscription products through the admin panel. Freely configure payment cycles (monthly, quarterly, annual) and set auto-retry counts and intervals for failed payments. Learners automatically receive pre-payment date notifications, payment success/failure alerts, and the system supports subscription cancellation, pause, and resume features by default. The admin dashboard provides a comprehensive view of subscription status, churn rates, and revenue trends.

faqs.q: How is exchange rate applied for international payments?
faqs.a: Real-time exchange rates are automatically applied through global PGs like Stripe and PayPal. Learners can view and pay in their local currency on the checkout screen, supporting over 140 currencies. Exchange fees are approximately 1-3% depending on the PG's policy, and settlements are converted and deposited in KRW. We also offer fixed exchange rate options to reduce currency fluctuation risk.

faqs.q: How is payment security ensured?
faqs.a: We apply a multi-layer security framework to protect learner payment information. Payments are processed in a PCI-DSS (Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard) certified environment, and card information is tokenized so actual card numbers are never stored on servers. All payment data is encrypted via TLS 1.3 protocol, and FDS (Fraud Detection System) detects and blocks suspicious transactions in real-time. 3D Secure authentication is also supported to proactively prevent unauthorized use.

faqs.a: Production timelines vary by content type. Simple instructor-recorded and edited content takes about 2-3 weeks, while 2D/3D animation or interactive simulation content takes about 4-6 weeks. The process follows a systematic approach: ① Planning & scriptwriting (1 week) → ② Design & recording (1-2 weeks) → ③ Editing & development (1-2 weeks) → ④ Review & revisions (3-5 days). Client approval is required at each stage before proceeding, ensuring the final product always matches your expectations.

faqs.q: Can content be made from existing PPT materials?
faqs.a: Yes, we can create various types of e-learning content based on your existing PPT materials. Options include slide-based lectures, screen recording lectures, narrated animation lectures, and quiz/branching interactive content. Send us your PPT and our instructional design experts will analyze the content and recommend the optimal content type to maximize learning effectiveness. We'll also suggest design improvements and interactive elements to enhance engagement.

faqs.q: Is mandatory training content updated with law changes?
faqs.a: Yes, with an annual license agreement, we provide free content updates for regulatory amendments. We maintain content for all major mandatory training categories including sexual harassment prevention, privacy protection, occupational safety, disability awareness, and workplace bullying prevention. When relevant laws are amended, we complete updates before the effective date so your organization can conduct training without any legal risk. Training completion records and certificate issuance are also managed automatically.

faqs.q: AI voice or professional voice actor — which is better?
faqs.a: Both options have their advantages, and the best choice depends on your content's nature. AI TTS (Text-to-Speech) is ideal for bulk production or fast delivery needs, saving approximately 60-70% compared to professional voice actors. Modern AI voices offer natural intonation and emotional expression that are more than sufficient for standard educational content. For premium content where brand image or emotional delivery is critical — such as CEO messages or promotional videos — professional voice actors are recommended. Mixing both approaches is also a popular option.

faqs.q: Is WCAG accessibility compliance required?
faqs.a: For public institutions, universities, and local governments, web accessibility compliance is a legal requirement under disability discrimination and e-government laws. While not legally mandatory for private companies, WEBHEADS applies WCAG 2.1 AA standards by default in all content production. This includes captions, alternative text, keyboard navigation support, and proper color contrast ratios, ensuring learners with visual or hearing impairments can learn without barriers. We also support accessibility certification audit preparation.

faqs.q: What's the difference between Light and PRO?
faqs.a: WEBHEADS Light's biggest advantages are rapid deployment (site launch in as few as 3 days) and a reasonable subscription-based pricing model. Choose between rental or SaaS deployment, and operate with pre-configured standard features. WEBHEADS PRO offers on-premise or SaaS deployment with complete freedom to customize UI/UX, features, and workflows. Full integration with ERP, CRM, and HR systems plus robust security (SSO/LDAP, air-gap) are included. We recommend the optimal option based on your business scale, security requirements, and budget — feel free to schedule a consultation.

faqs.q: Can we migrate from our existing LMS?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. We safely migrate all data including member information, learning history, content, and assessment results from your existing LMS. The process follows a systematic approach: ① Existing system analysis and data mapping → ② Data migration and verification in test environment → ③ Production environment switchover and stabilization monitoring. Migration is performed with zero downtime, and a dedicated engineer takes responsibility for the entire process. With dozens of successful LMS migrations completed, you can trust us completely.

faqs.q: Do you support multiple languages?
faqs.a: Yes, WEBHEADS LMS natively supports 11 languages including Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and Vietnamese. Both admin and learner interfaces can switch between languages, and AI auto-translation features allow quick conversion of content subtitles and descriptions into multiple languages. Additional languages beyond the default set can be added upon request, making our solution ideal for global education operations.

faqs.q: How long does implementation take?
faqs.a: Webheads Light can launch a site in as few as 3 days using base templates, or about 1-2 weeks including custom design and additional feature configuration. Webheads PRO takes approximately 4-12 weeks depending on project scope and customization requirements, following a systematic 5-stage process of planning, design, development, QA, and launch. Detailed timelines are provided after assessing project scope during a free consultation.

faqs.q: Is a mobile app available?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer hybrid apps supporting both iOS and Android. Fully integrated with the LMS, learners can continue learning across PC and mobile using the same account, with progress and learning history syncing in real-time. App-exclusive features include push notification-based learning reminders, offline content download over Wi-Fi, and mobile-optimized UI/UX. The app design can be customized to match your organization's brand identity.

faqs.q: How much does it cost?
faqs.a: WEBHEADS Light operates on a monthly subscription model with minimal upfront investment. Choose from Light, Basic, Plus, or Premium plans based on your learner count and feature needs, with all plans including basic hosting and maintenance. WEBHEADS PRO pricing varies by project scope, customization range, and number of integrated systems. Schedule a free consultation and we'll provide a detailed custom quote after understanding your requirements.

faqs.q: Are learning analytics available?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer powerful learning data analytics. View learning progress rates, completion rates, assessment results, access patterns, per-content viewing completion rates, and study time distribution all in a real-time dashboard. Monthly reports are auto-generated and emailed, and AI-powered analysis can identify learners at high risk of dropping out and automatically send personalized encouragement messages. Data-driven education management can significantly improve completion rates and learning outcomes.

faqs.q: Is there a limit on concurrent users?
faqs.a: WEBHEADS Light uses AWS Auto Scaling technology to automatically expand servers to handle thousands of concurrent users. The platform remains stable with no speed degradation or service interruption even during peak periods. WEBHEADS PRO scales flexibly based on server specifications — share your expected concurrent user volume in advance and we'll design the optimal server configuration. After peak seasons, servers automatically scale down to prevent unnecessary costs.
